hypothesis: On XAUUSD and GER40 M5, the Asia session (00:00-06:00 UTC) forms an accumulation range that is broken during the London window (07:00-10:00 UTC). ATR-normalized range filtering (0.5x-2.0x ATR) plus a body-size confirmation yields high-quality breakout entries. Inspired by LVC scout card.

signals.entry_long: within 07:00-10:00 UTC: close > asia_range_high by >= 0.5 * atr(14) AND candle_body >= 1.2 * atr(14) AND 0.5 <= (asia_range / atr(14)) <= 2.0

regime_filter.rule: atr(14) percentile over 200 bars between 20 and 90
regime_filter.purpose: Avoid dead-Asia days and ultra-news-spike days; require normal-to-elevated volatility.

exits.stop_loss: 0.75 * atr(14) beyond the opposite side of Asia range

session_filter: entries only 07:00-10:00 UTC; forced flat by 12:00 UTC
diagnostic_intent: Session-based breakout family, distinct from 24h breakout. One-trade-per-day max => ~250 trades/yr/symbol on M5.
